compiled_state.title: UPDATE: Add ui-designer caller to validate-review-output.sh with regression test
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
testing_mode: UPDATE
Task 1 tests 1 and 2 are RED gates. Regression assertion added atomically (same commit) to maintain Gate 2.

## Description
Atomically add ui-designer caller AND regression test. Splitting violates Gate 2 (assertion before implementation fails test suite).

In validate-review-output.sh, add at ALL 7 locations:
1. Comment header (~line 22): #   ui-designer            bd60a68f8060f939
2. HASH variable (after line 71): HASH_CALLER_UI_DESIGNER="bd60a68f8060f939" (same schema as design-wireframe)
3. usage() function (~line 105): add ui-designer entry
4. --list-callers handler (~line 124): add echo for ui-designer
5. Bash allowlist case (line 182): add ui-designer| to pattern
6. CALLER_SCHEMAS Python dict (line 476+): add ui-designer key with same 4 perspectives as design-wireframe
7. Dispatch case (~line 977): ui-designer) CALLER_HASH="$HASH_CALLER_UI_DESIGNER" ;;

In tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh, add after preplanning assertion (~line 122):
assert_contains "test_list_callers_shows_ui_designer: --list-callers includes ui-designer" "ui-designer" "$CALLERS_OUTPUT"

Backward compat: design-wireframe remains valid caller.

## File Impact
| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| plugins/dso/scripts/validate-review-output.sh | modify |
| tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh | modify |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] ui-designer appears in --list-callers output
  Verify: plugins/dso/scripts/validate-review-output.sh --list-callers | grep -q ui-designer
- [ ] Valid ui-designer review output accepted
  Verify: echo '"'"'{"subject":"t","reviews":[{"perspective":"Product Management","status":"reviewed","dimensions":{"story_alignment":5,"user_value":5,"scope_appropriateness":5,"consistency":5,"epic_coherence":5,"anti_pattern_compliance":5},"findings":[]},{"perspective":"Design Systems","status":"reviewed","dimensions":{"component_reuse":5,"visual_hierarchy":5,"design_system_compliance":5,"new_component_justification":5,"cross_story_consistency":5},"findings":[]},{"perspective":"Accessibility","status":"reviewed","dimensions":{"wcag_compliance":5,"keyboard_navigation":5,"screen_reader_support":5,"inclusive_design":5,"hcd_heuristics":5},"findings":[]},{"perspective":"Frontend Engineering","status":"reviewed","dimensions":{"implementation_feasibility":5,"performance":5,"state_complexity":5,"specification_clarity":5},"findings":[]}],"conflicts":[]}'"'"' > /tmp/ui-designer-r2-fixture.json && plugins/dso/scripts/validate-review-output.sh review-protocol /tmp/ui-designer-r2-fixture.json --caller ui-designer; S=$?; rm -f /tmp/ui-designer-r2-fixture.json; exit $S
- [ ] Existing test suite passes with new assertion
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh 2>&1 | grep -c FAIL | grep -q 0
- [ ] Script syntax valid
  Verify: bash -n plugins/dso/scripts/validate-review-output.sh

## Dependencies
Task 1 (4f41-492c)
